stemHtml: Select the true statement concerning isobars and wind flow patterns that are shown on a surface weather chart.

options.a: When isobars are close together, the pressure gradient force is greater and wind velocities are higher than when isobars are wide apart in the same location.
options.b: When isobars are far apart, the crest of standing waves may be marked by stationary lenticular clouds.
options.c: Surface winds flow perpendicular to isobars over flat terrain in mid-latitudes.
options.d: Isobars connect contour lines of equal temperature.
